description: Headless column descriptor for TmDataTable that defines header title, field accessor, sorting, filtering, grouping, visibility, alignment, width, custom cell/header templates, and group aggregation.

parameters.name: Field
parameters.description: Field accessor that returns the cell value for a given row item.

parameters.name: CellTemplate
parameters.description: Optional custom cell template. When set, overrides Field rendering.

parameters.name: PropertyName
parameters.description: Property name for sorting and filtering (e.g. "Name", "CreatedAt"). Defaults to Title when null.

parameters.name: Sortable
parameters.description: Whether this column can be sorted by clicking its header.

parameters.name: Filterable
parameters.description: Whether this column shows an inline filter input.

parameters.name: FilterType
parameters.description: Type of filter control to render (Text, Number, Date, Boolean, Select).

parameters.name: FilterOptions
parameters.description: Options for Select filter type (string-keyed values).

parameters.name: Hideable
parameters.description: Whether this column can be toggled via the column picker. Default true.

parameters.name: HiddenByDefault
parameters.description: Whether this column is hidden by default (user must show it via column picker).

parameters.name: CssClass
parameters.description: Additional CSS class applied to each data cell in this column.

parameters.name: HeaderTemplate
parameters.description: Custom header render fragment (replaces plain Title text when set).

parameters.name: Order
parameters.description: Display order (lower index = further left). Columns with same order preserve declaration order.

parameters.name: Groupable
parameters.description: Whether this column can be used for row grouping.

parameters.name: GroupDisplayFormatter
parameters.description: Custom display formatter for group header when grouped by this column.

parameters.name: GroupAggregates
parameters.description: Aggregation types to show in group row for this column.

examples.title: Sortable and filterable column
examples.code:
<TmDataTableColumn Title="Name"
                   PropertyName="FullName"
                   Field="e => e.FullName"
                   Sortable="true"
                   Filterable="true"
                   Groupable="true"
                   Width="200px" />

examples.title: Column with custom cell template
examples.code:
<TmDataTableColumn Title="Status" Field="e => e.Status" Filterable="true" FilterType="FilterType.Select" FilterOptions="@statusOptions">
    <CellTemplate Context="item">
        <TmBadge Variant="GetStatusVariant(item.Status)">@item.Status</TmBadge>
    </CellTemplate>
</TmDataTableColumn>
